name: io.github.b0ase/path402
title: Path402 — Tokenised Web Content for AI Agents
description: MCP server enabling AI agents to discover, evaluate, acquire, and re-serve tokenised web content using the $402 protocol. Agents inspect URLs for the $ monetary signalling prefix, evaluate acquisition profitability via algorithmic bonding curves, acquire bearer tokens granting content access and re-serving rights, and earn revenue by distributing content to downstream requesters. Supports cross-chain settlement (BSV, Base, Solana, Ethereum) via DNS-based facilitator routing.

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Path402 API server (default: https://path402.com)
environmentVariables.name: PATH402_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Default spending budget in satoshis for token acquisitions
environmentVariables.name: PATH402_DEFAULT_BUDGET

environmentVariables.description: BSV wallet private key (WIF format) for on-chain acquisitions
environmentVariables.name: PATH402_WALLET_WIF
